name: manager
description: A durable local workspace for projects, context, and next actions.

interface.shortDescription: Your workspace for projects, context, and next actions
interface.longDescription: wirenet manager gives Codex a durable local workspace for understanding what is on your plate, keeping projects current, and carrying useful context across tasks. It combines personal onboarding, reviewable Project Packs, bounded experiments, cross-workspace routing, and optional local knowledge search while keeping your content on your computer.
defaultPrompt: Set up my local wirenet manager.
Show my current stack and next actions.
Review my active projects and open loops.
